name: Rival Species
summary: In the far distant future of the 40th millennium behind the stars there is only war. Enter the universe of WARHAMMER 40,000 and play a mighty warrior for one out of an ever growing list of rival species. A large PvP team multiplayer mod for Half-Life that plays similary to Battlefield/Battlefront, based on the Game's Workshop property. Eventually Exterminatus, A sequel for the Source Engine would be made

name: Timothy and the Tower of Mu
storyline:
Timothy's grandfather is dead... But legends tell of a tower so high that disappears above the clouds, built by a god. If someone manages to climb it to the top, a wish is granted. Timothy, armed with hope and courage, decides to face this deadly test and bring back to life his grandfather.
The Tower of Mu is waiting for the next victim: are you enough nimble, strong and smart to overcome this challenge?
summary: Ascend the tower to save your grandfather in this classic, hardcore action-platformer. The Tower of Mu is waiting for you... Push past each check point to the next awaiting challenge; dashing, jumping, and slinging your way up to the towers peak. Die. learn. Overcome.

name: A Very Corporate Escape Room
summary: This is no ordinary escape room; this is A Very Corporate Escape Room. In this first person 3D puzzle adventure you will solve challenges, unlock secret locations and uncover the dark truth about your manager in a chilling satire of office life.

name: Power Guy World
storyline: Power Guy is a video game character, who together with his dog Merf, live in a small computer, playing games all day. But then, an evil group of hackers broke into their home and kidnapped Merf! Now it's up to Power Guy to save his best friend by getting into the world of the internet!
summary: Power Guy World is a 30 exit SMW romhack created by LucasMegaStriker as a tribute to the Vtuber "Power Guy".

name: Ace wo Nerae!
summary: A tennis game for the Super Famicom based on the 1970s manga and anime of the same name.

name: The Deal
summary: A Doom II WAD.

name: Nightmare Kart: The Old Karts
summary: An upcoming free expansion to Nightmare Kart with a brand new mini-campaign, racers, karts, tracks, power-ups, and game modes.

name: Born for the Light: Wavelength Radiant Collapse
summary: Endless world. Endless sky. Endless light. Will the shadows be cast upon all Children dwelling on the Treetops? Regardless, I spread my prosthetic wings, taking a leap of faith.

name: Chomp Chomp
summary:
The bad ghosts have scared the Chomplets away and captured them all in cages! Help Chomp Chomp rescue the captured Chomplets by collecting keys and opening the cages, while you keep Chomp Chomp fed by eating pellets, and by eating power pellets to unleash Chomp's power to pay the ghosts back one Chomp at a time! 
 
Customize your Chomp: 
Make your Chomp feel special as you customize with hats, eyes, teeth, and color! In any combination you want! 
 
Upgrade your Chomp: 
Make your Chomp Chomp healthier, faster, and stronger so he can defeat the ghost army! 
 
Chomplet Farm: 
Watch your Chomplets play in their farm! Idle and you can feed them, and earn extra coins to buy upgrades for your Chomp! 
 
Adventure: 
Endless levels that increasingly get harder the further you make it, how far can you make it before the ghost army catches you! See how far you've made it with the highest score and highest level achieved stats! 
 
Well, what are you waiting for? Save the Chomplets, eat some pellets, and Chomp some ghosts!

name: Satella-Q: Mou Sugu Haru desu ne - Chotto Sate-Q Shimasen ka?
summary: A single-episode season of Satella-Q.

name: Legacy of Sin: Blood Oath
summary: Buy unique troops, control the battlefield, defend the routes from different enemies! Hand drawn frame by frame 2D animation!

name: BanG Dream! Girls Band Party! for Nintendo Switch
summary:
Popular rhythm game in Japan!
Tap to the rhythm of over 200 songs to choose from.
Play both original and cover songs from popular J-Pop artists and anime songs!
Play your favorite songs on a level of difficulty that suits you!

name: Silence, Exile, and Cunning
summary: Silence, Exile, and Cunning is a narrative exploration of real geography and fictionalized history. You progress through scenes, interact with unusual characters, and solve puzzles through James’s wit and Nora’s practical sense.

name: Suna no Embrace: Eden no Sato no Never
storyline:
It is said that there is an unknown land somewhere in Neverland. The land goes by the name Eden. It is an arid land, for it is where the Gods of Sand and Wind live harmoniously as husband and wife. Very few people call it home, for those who lay eyes upon it soon tire of its wastelands that stretch to the very end of the world.
The sands and winds yet dance about in Eden, as if they had forgotten the passage of time...
summary: A RPG set in a desert fantasy world where water is the most valued resource.

name: The Tales of Bayun
summary: Can a flat world resting on the backs of three demon bears live in peace? Of course not! Immerse yourself in the universe of the dark Slavic legends, explore the characters' stories and make difficult choices that affect the course of events. Bayun the Cat will help you. If you're lucky, that is.

name: Umineko: Ougon Musou Kyoku - Cross
summary:
A tag-team fighting game based around the Umineko no Naku Koro ni universe of visual novels, Cross is the followup to 2010's Ougon Musou Kyoku.

In this version George, Jessica, and Rosa from the Ushiromiya family join the fray.

name: For What Will Come
summary: Return to your childhood home in hopes to see your family, uncover the secrets behind your family's disappearance. What will you uncover? Will the family mystery end with you, or never be thought of again..

name: Merge Games Horror Bundle
summary: What do dark Nordic fables, intergalactic cruises and Lovecraftian gore all have in common? Gruesome, gory and ghoulish monsters! Dive into the horror-themed worlds of Bramble: The Mountain King, Morbid: The Seven Acolytes and Slaycation Paradise - if you dare!

name: Pica
summary: This is a casual jigsaw puzzle game. All you need to do is use the mouse to drag the pieces to the correct positions, and when you complete the puzzle and form a complete picture, you can unlock the picture gallery.

name: Viking Heroes 4
summary: Join the Viking heroes in a race against time to save the world from eternal darkness. As the sun and moon falter and Fenrir threatens to consume them, the Vikings must travel across realms to forge a magical chain that can capture him.

name: Eternal
summary: Eternal is a first-person survival horror shooter where the player is trapped in a sinister mental asylum filled with terrifying entities. Your goal is to unravel the dark secrets of the asylum as you fight to escape this nightmarish place.

name: Street Vendor Simulator
summary: Buy, sell, and earn big on the city streets by selling water.

name: Filthy, Stinking, Orcs!
summary: Filthy, Stinking, Orcs! is a VR tower defense game set in a fantasy world besieged by monsters. Plan your strategy and join in the action by taking control of the weapons of war with your own hands! Defend your citadel and villages in beaches, plains, swamps, and mountains across 16 levels. Fight orcs, goblins, ogres, and dragons! Fire bows, crossbows, cannons, and machine guns!

name: Shining Song Starnova: Idol Empire
storyline:
The girls of Starnova are back in a new business simulation game! Due to the underhanded machinations of the evil Golden Calf Productions, the girls' live has been cancelled, and what's worse, their talent agency has had to relocate to a new office! 
 
This time, it'll fall upon Producer-san to turn this dire predicament around! As the girls' manager, you'll have to build your office, re-hire the girls, and of course, get the money flowing back by putting on the greatest lives in the nation! 
 
Do you have the management skills to once again accomplish everyone's dreams? Now, you must take the reins as Producer-san and save the day!
summary: The girls of Starnova are back in a new business simulation game! It's up to you the producer to build your office, re-hire the girls and get the money flowing to put on the greatest live concert ever. Do you have the management skills to once again accomplish everyone's dreams?

name: Football Manager Touch 2016
summary: Football Manager Touch 2016 is a streamlined football management simulation designed for faster play on tablets and computers. It features over 130 real leagues, cross-save compatibility between devices, and the series’ 3D match engine. New additions include Create-a-Club mode, Prozone match analysis, expanded tactical options, and various unlockables, offering a more accessible alternative to the full Football Manager experience.

name: DCS World: NS 430 Navigation System for SA342 Gazelle by Eagle Dynamics, Polychop Simulations
summary: The NS 430 for the SA342 Gazelle module integrates the NS 430 panel directly into the SA342 Gazelle cockpit (not as a pop-up display).

name: Caravan Shooting Collection
summary:
Caravan Shooting Collection is a 1995 Super Famicom compilation of classic shoot 'em up games from 1985 to 1987 that were originally released on the Nintendo Entertainment System.

The games include the 1985 Famicom port of Star Force (the Arcade version was originally created by Tecmo, but the home port was developed by Hudson), 1986's Star Soldier and 1987's Hector (a.k.a. Starship Hector).

All three of these games were the subjects of the Hudson All-Japan Caravan Festival, which for a long time hosted a new Hudson shoot 'em up every year and traveled around Japan with competitors in different prefectures attempting to earn the highest scores. The game would then be available for sale shortly before or after the competition, which helped raise its profile.

name: Urban Trial Tricky: Deluxe Edition
summary: Grab your seat and pull off the most savage tricks and combos on your motorbike. Ride freely, spin around in the air, go back and forth and let yourself be carried away by the fun, fast-paced gameplay, colorful visuals, and smooth controls.

name: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets
storyline: The plot follows Harry's second year at Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry, during which a series of messages on the walls of the school's corridors warn that the Chamber of Secrets has been opened and that the heir of Slytherin would kill all pupils who do not come from all-magical families.
summary: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets is the sequel to Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone for PC and Mac. As its prequel, five different versions of this game were released for different gaming platforms. In this version, you control Harry in an action-adventure platforming gameplay. The most significant difference from the previous game is that gameplay is less linear, with Hogwarts becoming more of an open world. You can Interact with familiar characters from the movie like Ron, Hermione and of course Gilderoy Lockhart. Additionally, there are multiple mini-games and side quests.

name: E-Snake
summary:
A phone classic, brought to the E-Reader!

E-Snake contains many levels, modes, secrets and its own achievements!

name: Eonwar
summary: Comfortably paced, match-based strategy with a PvE twist, contrasted with intense physics-based combat. Take direct control of tanks, infantry and ships across space and planetside. Manage your powerful deck of commanders and battle with up to 6 players! Will you rule or unite Omega Centauri?

name: Solitaire Quest: Garden Story
summary: Join the captivating journey of Solitaire Quest: Garden Story and watch the garden bloom under your care. Solve solitaire puzzles, restore the garden's beauty, and uncover the secrets that await. Play now and immerse yourself in the world of solitaire delight!

name: Dying Night Sex with Zombi
summary: Cum on girls, have fun and get ready for the shocking ending of the story ... A third-person PORN game set in the future at a research station full of sexy female employees. Explore space stations and read the sexual pleasures of girls from their science computers.

name: NecroWorm
summary:
Chew your way through 120 levels of addictive puzzle gameplay, where your only goal is to devour everything but your own wormy self. It's quick, tasty, and hard to resist. Just like a late-night snack.

How hard can it be to grab a bite? Quite hard, when you're an abominable serpent dwelling in a cemetery. Collect keys, open doors, and plan your every move so you don't paint yourself into a corner. Like it EXTRA SPICY? Hurry up and make it within the time limit—but watch out for the cramps.

name: Police Reponse VR: Disturbance
summary: THE REAL DEAL EXPERIENCE OF BEING AN OFFICER OF THE LAW ARE YOU READY TO BE A UK POLICE OFFICER Set in one room following a 999/911 Disturbance Report 2+ HOURS OF RANDOMIZED AUDIO Scale The Ranks MADE BY EX COPS

name: Symble
summary: A code-cracking logic game, where players must guess a secret five letter word. Each guess reveals a set of three mystery symbols, and players must use their guesses to determine what each symbol represents in order to decode the secret word.

name: Solstice Chronicles: MIA
summary: Battle for survival against waves of Martian mutants in this tactical twist on twin-stick shooters. Using the skills of your drone companion, make fight-or-flight decisions that drastically alter the threats you face. Will your choices lead you to freedom... or your doom?

name: 1001 Jigsaw: Cute Cats
summary: A new game in the series of 1001 Puzzles. Cute, funny, cozy cats will melt even the coldest hearts! Assemble the puzzle pieces and enjoy the cute faces of pets.

name: Streamers Company Tycoon
summary: First online streamer agency in this country! A new company! Now face the whole country and recruit company manager!

name: Dungeon Drops
summary: Jump, fight and climb your way out of the ever-changing depths of the Snake Castle in Dungeon Drops!

name: Repit
summary: Madness is the repetition of the same action over and over again, in the hope of a change. The challenge that Repit throws at your nerves is not everyone is ready to accept and only a few will be able to reach the end

name: Mikagami Sumika No Seifuku Katsudou
summary:
The protagonist met a girl in a school uniform at Japan’s famed theme park Delight Resort. While it was their first meeting, they hit it off right away, but they didn’t exchange contacts before leaving their separate ways.

Some days later, he discovered after moving into a new home that his neighbor was the girl from that day. Even though she was happy to meet him once again, she froze upon hearing her friend say:

“Hey… He thinks you’re a high school student, doesn’t he?”

Sumika had already graduated from high school and was in the third year at university. On one hand, she was looking for a job, but on the other, she was wearing a school uniform that was not befitting her age. It was a revival to remember ‘that time’: a second school life.

name: Alleykat
summary:
Alleykat is a vertically-scrolling racer with elements of a shoot-em up game.

The player, a speeder pilot, strives to become the Alleykat Champion by competing in eight space stadiums scattered around the galaxy. Different races like demolition derbies, time-trials, endurance epics and others feature all kinds of obstacles like rocks, pillars, bridges and hard walls, and several types of enemies race along.

The game also features a cooperative two-player-mode.

name: Sportvida CyberDash
summary: Sportvida CyberDash is a VR running game that delivers both stress relief and thrilling challenges. Set in a high-speed, futuristic world of light and technology, you’ll embark on an intense adventure where sprinting, dodging, and smashing obstacles offer an unparalleled sense of release.

name: Coastline to Atmosphere
storyline:
This mod continues the story where Half-Life 2 finished and offers one possible scenario. After the big explosion, you fall to the ground and are very badly injured. Some people find you and take you home to a small village outside the city where the citadel was built. After 3 months you’re strong again and want to fight on.

You have never seen Alyx or any of the others since the explosion. But you try to find new people that will fight with you against Breen. Nobody wants to help, some are afraid, others think that Breen has learned his lesson and won’t start again. It also seems that most of his organization was lost in the explosion. Then you hear that along the coast Breen is starting again and trying to take control again. So you decide to go to the coast. There you take a little boat and go along the coast so the Combine won’t notice you coming.
summary:
Coastline to Atmosphere is a big Single Player Modification for Half-Life 2. It's actually 15 Single Player maps with a story that links them together.

Leon Stephan Brinkmann took about 1 year to create this. He's done an excelent job to create this. With new models, such as a Keycard model, Tree models, a new shiny metal texture. And new sounds from the games Medal of Honor, Call of Duty, Soldier of Fortune 2, Max Payne 2, Cold Winter and a whole lot of ambient sounds.

name: Spooky Survivors
summary: Spooky Survivors puts you in the shoes of Van Hobo, a quirky hero battling the supernatural! Start with all unlocks BUT choose which to level up as you face endless waves. Equip powerful gear and unlock unique abilities. Outlast the nightmare and prove yourself as the ultimate spooky survivor!

name: Sonic Uprising
summary: SONIC UPRISING is a 2D side-scrolling platform fan project led by bennascar and Team Giga-Drive. Uprising is inspired by the classic formula from the Mega Drive Era of Sonic the Hedgehog, expanding it by taking elements from various other titles in the series. The project's goal is to create a story inspired by SEGA's Sonic Forces, while also being able to tell a narrative that goes far beyond a simple reboot.

name: Lost Pages: Classic
summary: In this roguelike deck-building game, uncover ancient secrets in dark mist. Build your deck with magic circles and artifacts, battle monsters, and plan routes on a shifting map. Face the 100 levels of the dimensional gate. Grow and take on new challenges as you progress.

name: Ballsy! World Cup 2020
summary: Retro football game, with local coop & cup mode. Less sluggish than modern football games, but with more 'weighty' physics than most retro football games. No referee, so no offside or fouls - all is permitted.

name: Retro Meadow
summary: A pixel-art sandbox where you design infinite maps. Build your perfect world with retro designs. No simulation, no action - just cozy construction. What unique worlds will you create with cute pixels? Turn your visions into peaceful creations.

name: Refrigerant Recovery Simulation
summary: Recover, Pressure Test, Evacuate, Charge - watch a detailed process in 3D and then try it yourself hands-on using this fully interactive tool.

name: The Shape Killer
summary: Take on the role of a sniper and get paid to eliminate high-profile targets, find and defuse bombs, massacre civilians, eliminate dangers, explore 70+ missions. Sometimes be a hero, sometimes be an assassin! Start as a novice shooter, turn pro, unlock new game modes and become a legend.

name: Shounen D no Kokuhaku
summary:
A super short melancholy BL game with the theme of adolescence and juvenile delinquency.
A certain prefecture public high school had 2 consecutive murder cases on September 7, 1997.
Autumn is a week after the opening ceremony after the summer vacation.
It is a bizarre murder case that occurred in an ordinary public high school.
It was a brutal and bizarre murder, and the fact that all the victims were boys and girls in the same class shook the world.
Also, the fact that the criminal who was the perpetrator was a boy student in the same class made a lot of noise.

name: Open Hexagon
summary:
Open Hexagon is a free open-source clone of the game "Super Hexagon by Terry Cavanagh".
Gameplay is easy to learn but hard to master.
You control a triangle that rotates around the center of the screen.
Your goal is to stay alive as long as possible by avoiding the walls that go towards the center.
Features JSON and LUA scripting for complete customization and level sharing.

Compete online for the top high scores!

name: The Last Sanctum
summary: A dark fantasy tactical RPG, a forsaken necromancer, raise an army of the damned to reclaim your sanctum. Explore an open, isometric world, conquer cursed dungeons, recruit souls, and master team-based, turn-based combat in a decaying realm.

name: Cosmic Osmo and the Worlds Beyond the Mackerel
summary: You're an Osmo, a strange creature indeed. You explore the galaxy in your spaceship, and the planets you encounter are almost as bizarre as the Osmos themselves. There are seven worlds presented for your consideration, each more goofy and peculiar than the last. Cosmic Osmo is a game about exploration and discovery, not winning or challenges.

name: Vacuous Sugar Quest
storyline: Vac is an adventurer trying to climb Sugar Mountain to prove her sugar gliding abilities.
summary:
Vacuous Sugar Quest is a platformer featuring climbing and gliding mechanics.

Play as Vac, an adventurer trying to climb Sugar Mountain to prove her sugar gliding abilities!

name: Liz: Before the Plague
summary: One night, in a near future a special investigation Unit named Liz has to face a strange case that seems a common one, but it's not. She has to respond to a distress call from a pharmaceutical company and investigate, collecting infos and survive using her own tools. Figure out what happened in order to resolve the case and find the truth about the laboratory accident.

name: GigaBash: MechaJuras
summary: This free DLC adds “MechaJURAS”, an original character from GigaBash to the game. Equipped with a unique moveset featuring its massive Rocket Drill to decimate Titans, and a Grapple Claw to grab foes from afar, MechaJURAS is ready to roll out!

name: Office Affairs: Executive Decisions
summary: Office Affairs: Executive Decisions is a mature, open-world RPG that blends the intrigue of high-stakes corporate drama with the complexities of modern relationships. Set in the world of corporate finance, step into a world where power, passion, and politics collide.

name: Evil Forest
summary: A meteorite fell from sky and turned everything in the Kingdom evil. As the last hero it's your mission to destroy all the devilish creatures. Enter the portal to a fantastic world full of magic, treasures and weapons. Battle monsters, collect treasures and unravel the mystery of the ancient forest.

name: Phantom Thief Mew's Secret Prima
summary: In an unexpected turn of events, Miu becomes a phantom thief. As a phantom thief, you have to carry out various mission along with her childhood friend, Chinatsu. To complete your mission,you have to sneak into the targetted location and dodge the obstacles in the way to proceed.

name: Pinball FX: Nightmare Mansion
summary: The old mansion on the hill has been abandoned for decades. Most people say it's haunted, and on some nights screams can be heard coming from within. What evils have taken up residence there? Do you dare enter and find out?

name: Puzzler World 2
summary:
The highly anticipated sequel to last year’s PC hit, Puzzler World 2 brings more puzzles, new games, fun rewards and an all new Master Mode.

Created by the same team that developed the original Puzzler World, the team were able to flex their development muscles and improve on every section in the game. With a revised selection of puzzles and mini-games, brand new Master Mode, a new reward structure and the inclusion of trophies – Puzzler World 2 takes the highly addictive franchise to a whole new level.

Each puzzle completed unlocks a bonus game which in turn rewards the player with the all-new prize wheel. Players spin the wheel and see what prize they can earn. Players can win hint tokens that can then be used to buy help if they get stuck on tricky puzzles.

name: Super Space Pug
summary: Super Space Pug is a classic arcade shmup. Take control of 'Demetrius the Third'(Space Pug) to defend your personal space from the evil, fish flinging cats and random rocks because its a space shmup, and without rocks it would be rather non-space-y.

name: Liquidator
summary:
Liquidator is the story of a dynamic new generation of shooters. 
In the game you have to play the role of a former soldier of special purpose, which was injured, and now he was sent to work in one of the buildings of the CIA. In the first day, something went wrong...

name: Another Day in Paradise
storyline: In Another Day in Paradise you will find a third-person adventure where you will play with 5 characters to uncovering the mysterious events that took place that October 24th. For this you will have to explore the different places and collect the clues and valuable objects, which will help you to continue advancing in the story. You will obtain information through the cinematic sequences, the collectible audios in the form of cassettes and the notes (which you can access from your inventory).
summary: Play with 5 characters, find the clues and reveal the mystery of that October 24th. You will explore the places and survive terrifying rituals, the astral world is waiting for you. A story that mixes adventure and terror in equal parts.

name: Sid Meier's Civilization V: Scrambled Nations Map Pack
summary:
The Scrambled Nations Map Pack for Sid Meier’s Civilization V includes ten map scripts based on real-world geographic outlines of specific nations and regions. While each map retains the authentic external shape of its corresponding region, the interior terrain is randomly generated with each playthrough, providing a new experience every time.

Included Maps:
Canada, Australia, Japan, Scandinavia, Great Britain, France, Turkey, Italy, Russia and China.

name: Another Way of Gettin' Paid
storyline:
Ever since his college days, Shunji Naruse has been in a relationship with the female president of a real estate company, Mizuru Kozuki—as her sugar baby. Even now as a working adult, he works as her private secretary.

One day, Shunji's deliciously gratifying life gets even better when he encounters a uniformed girl, Chisato Hinata—and becomes her sugar daddy.

What's more, Shunji's sugar baby/daddy life suddenly becomes even livelier when a divorced wife and one of Mizuru's old classmates, Kasumi Tachibana; as well as Chisato's friend, Hasumi Tachibana—get added to the mix.

As his various partners begin to interact in ways they were never supposed to, Shunji finds his circle of lovers expanding farther than he could have ever imagined...
summary: Juggling being a sugar baby and sugar daddy at the same time... and it only gets more complex from there!

name: Arcade Archives: Life Force
summary: Arcade Archives: Life Force is a port of the shooting game Life Force. The player will challenge against the aggressions from the Bacterian special force known as Salamander. This title will include Salamander which is the Japanese version of the game, and Life Force which is rearranged as the Japanese version of Life Force that was released in 1987 in Japan.

name: I am Weapon: Revival
summary: Have you ever faced your worst nightmare? What if you have no choice but to move on and see what’s behind it? Then you’d better arm yourself with a couple of big guns, stock up on ammo and show them all what a real nightmare is!

name: New Witch in Town
storyline:
When you’re forced to leave your endangered forest home, your grandma only gives you one instruction: “Keep your magic secret.” But when you reach your new town, you realize you might have a chance to save your forest after all.

New Witch in Town is a 500,000-word Young Adult interactive fantasy novel by Grace Card. It's entirely text-based, without graphics or sound effects, and fueled by the vast, unstoppable power of your imagination.

You've lived half your life in a remote magical forest, learning the secrets of your magical abilities from your grandma. But after sudden news that the forest may be in danger, you’re forced to move into your grandma’s old house in a town you haven’t visited since you were a child. When you arrive in your new town, you discover a place caught between the promise of flashy developments and the reality of gradual decline. As you begin to settle in, however, you start to notice more than a few strange things going on around you—mysterious trees, stolen sculptures, and dreams about the forest you can’t quite understand. And all the while, your grandma’s whereabouts are a mystery.
summary: Save your magical forest, uncover old mysteries, and make new friends in this Young Adult urban fantasy game!

name: Pictionary: The Game of Video Quick Draw
summary:
The excitement of one of the America's most popular party games comes to the NES with Pictionary. Not only are the elements of the board game there, but so are several picture-based mini-games. Additionally, this version can be played solo, whereas the board game requires at least three people.

The basic objective of Pictionary is for a person on a team to try and illustrate a word he or she has been given using only drawings. The team must guess what is being illustrated within a certain amount of time. As a reward for guessing the puzzle correctly, the team gets to advance on a board. The team that makes it to the end of the board first wins.

In addition to the classic drawing aspect to the game, there are also four mini-games to be played in order for a team to win. These include "Attack of the Paint Zombies" (similar to Space Invaders), "The Warehouse Shuffle" (moving crates from one side of a warehouse to another as gremlins try to steal them), "Four Alarm Rescue" (catching people as they jump out of windows), and "Leapin' Energy Casules!" (capturing energy balls to fuel your spaceship).

There are also other game modes that enable you to use cards you may have for an actual Pictionary board game or a practice mode enabling you to simply draw.

name: Harvest Days: My Dream Farm
storyline: No traffic jams. No skyscraper canyons. No boredom. Escape your daily nine-to-five grind and face a new challenge. With Harvest Days your dream of a new beginning comes true. A life on your own little peace of land, surrounded by friendly animals and cheerful neighbors is becoming reality. Take over a small, forgotten farm and become one with nature. Care for the animals or tend to your garden. Harvest and trade your crops. Go fishing or explore the charming open world to uncover all its secrets. The sky is the limit! Are you ready?
summary:
A unique mix of farming sim, life sim and business sim.

A new life in the country is calling! Fulfil your dreams and manage your very own farm in this lovingly designed open-world game. Work hard, manage your business wisely and your little farm might grow into a personal paradise, surrounded by boundless, untouched nature.

name: Nusantara: Bermuda
summary: An otome game with intricate dark fantasy/fairytales. Can you solve the mysteries and find love?

name: Frogun Encore
storyline: Three whole years have passed since Renata defeated Beelzebub, and her small vacation in Jake's town is cut short when the fly bois attack again! It seems one of Beelzebub's loyal followers has an evil scheme in motion to bring him back, and Renata, Jake and Hatter will have to travel the whole world to foil his plans.
summary: Frogun Encore is a dashing standalone expansion/sequel to indie hit Frogun! Join now older Renata and Jake in a trek around the whole world to prevent the return of Beelzebub. Encore builds on Frogun's retro PS1/N64 formula. Plus, enjoy the whole adventure in true couch co-op.

name: Virtomae
storyline: One day a little robot vacuum from space landed on Earth, crashing into a small-town laboratory. After being discovered in the pile of shards and rubble by one of the interns (a.k.a. the player), the cutesy device turned out to be a friendly, pet-like companion with a very unusual power... turning itself or all of the surroundings into any objects imaginable! Deciding to befriend and reverse-engineer the small cleaner, your goal is to help them survive, stay happy and make sure their mission of exploration is successful, before it's time for the inevitable grand return to Venus.
summary:
A 2000s-style fully customizable virtual pet game!

Take care of your virtual buddy of choice! Have fun together (play an increasing number of minigames, listen to music and watch videos) to make sure they are satisfied! You can also connect with your friends! Return to your pet daily to help it prosper! As presented during the SGDA Summit 2022 Student Games Showcase!

name: Zombie Tactics
summary: Tactical turn-based zombie survival game, featuring full story, survival mode, and alternative endings! Lead your team through the zombie apocalypse, earning items and skill points along the way. What ethical choices will you make later in the story?

name: Welcome to Dustown
summary: Welcome to Dustown is a 4-player cooperative horror game. Play as field scientists exploring vast fields of labyrinthine corn, collecting samples and evidence on behalf of a mysterious corporation. Just make sure you don't get killed at the crossroads.

name: Rockman 8 Metal Heroes Famicom
storyline: Dr. Light tells Mega Man about a new island referred to as Uncharted Island, because it isn't on any kind of map. When Mega Man travels to the island with Rush Jet, it seems like something crashed into the island. Mega Man tries to find it, but it seems like Dr. Wily already found it. What's got left behind is a mysterious broken robot (Duo). After returning to Dr. Light, the doctor tells him that he needs to go to Wily's fortress while he's fixing the broken robot. But before he can, it seems like Wily split the object he found (called Dark Energy) on the island into 8 pieces and gave them to his new robots who, with the power of the energy, are trying to take over the world for Wily. Mega Man must stop the robots and defeat Wily once again!
summary: Rockman 8 FC for short, is a fanmade 8-bit version of Mega Man 8 for PC. Like Rockman 7 Famicom before, it is a recreation of the normal game, except sprites and backgrounds are converted to the normal 8-bit format, so it is like the past Mega Man games. Due to this, there are no FMVs.

name: Tiny Dangerous Dungeons Remake
summary: Guide Timmy the little treasure hunter through traps and puzzles to reach the legendary treasure. This classic mini metroidvania is remade with new visuals, music, and content.

name: The Guest: Home Alone
summary: The Guest: Home Alone is a short psychological horror experience. You play as Tyler, a man who returns home after a long day at work seeking rest — but something feels wrong. Are you really alone?.

name: Sable's Grimoire
summary:
Sable's Grimoire is a visual novel / dating sim featuring monster girls in a magic academy setting.

Play as Sable, an aspiring magic researcher, as he get sucked into the daily lives and troubles of his demi-human classmates.

name: The Pool Invasion
summary: Use your arrow keys to balance the tower from the first level and for the other levels. Zack and Cody are at the pool and because they got bored they decided to play some funny games that will also get them points. Help Zack and Cody get through every level of the game without their mother seeing them and without getting punished.

name: LiveStream
summary: You are a streamer who entered an abandoned building for hype. But the game quickly turns into a real nightmare — the chat and donations influence what's happening, and you try to survive and understand what's going on.

name: Lightning Katana
storyline: Slash, Parry, Shoot and Dodge Roll your way through the Neo-Nippon Yakuza to avenge your pet Dogsuke and take on the top brass and baddest hit squad in all of Neo Nippon, the Ryujin Ichizoku!
summary: Kick doors, shoot lightning, and parry bullets in this blazing fast first-person shoot'n slash inspired by Hotline Miami

name: DCS World: Flaming Cliffs 3
summary: DCS World: Flaming Cliffs 3 is the next evolution of the Flaming Cliffs series that operates with DCS World. FC3 features the F-15C, A-10A, Su-27, Su-33, MiG-29A, MiG-29S and Su-25. The FC3 aircraft provide an easy learning curve for new players and focuses on a broad range of aircraft rather than a detailed single aircraft.

name: Touhou: Dreaming Butterfly
storyline:
It says that people entered someone’s dream inadvertently in Gensokyo.
The leading roles are also our miko and magician.
As the only ‘waking’ people, they came across acquaintances, one of who was abnormal manic, or sinister, or strange, or…themselves?
summary: "Touhou Dreaming Butterfly" is a fan game for Touhou Project developed by Strrationalism. The game is intended for game players who enjoy the horizontal STG and to promote the contrasting gaming mode for others who are accustomed to the vertical STG gaming of the original Touhou Project. The translated version of this work will be published in the future.

name: Book of Merlin
summary:
"Book of Merlin" In the game you will act as the
descendant of Wizard Merlin, you need to solve
different puzzles remained in the Magic Tower
with your wisdom. You will get the unique power
from the book of Merlin after crack the seal!

name: Project Alpha 002
summary:
Abandoned wilderness awaits you, every day is a struggle to survive.
Fight against hunger, the nature and the remaining residents.
Collect resources to build a fortress, gain experience to earn supply drops
to improve your survival chances in survivalmode.
Survive the nights in the wild and beat the highscore in huntedmode
Find hints to get behind the story of project alpha in the storymode.

name: Jawbreaker
summary: Let’s play hide-and-seek with serial killers. Jawbreaker is a psychological horror game that will have you running, hiding, and fighting to survive a terrifying gang-infested society on the verge of collapse. Though that’s not all, once the sun goes down the true fear will begin...

name: Magic Soldier
summary:
Embark on an epic journey in Magic Soldier, a 2D open-world MMORPG.
Explore vast landscapes, fight powerful foes, craft unique items, and team up with players worldwide. Adventure awaits, shape your destiny today !

name: Adventures of Pip
summary: Play as the ultimate digital underdog in the Adventures of Pip,an action-platformer with a fresh gameplay twist inside a retro 32-bit world. Alas, Pip is an unlikely 1-pixel hero yet has the unique ability to absorb the pixels of his defeated enemies to evolve into three different forms. Players will skillfully switch between these three forms while exploring five worlds on an epic 10-hour campaign to defeat the Skeleton Queen. Adventures of Pip features a soundtrack by Jake “virt” Kaufman, composer for Shantae and the Pirates Curse, Bloodrayne: Betrayal, Shovel Knight, and more. The game will be available in June 2015 on Steam (PC/MAC), Nintendo WiiU, and coming soon to Xbox One, and PS4.

name: Ascendshaft and Endless Shaft
summary:
2 games in one Ascendshaft and Endless Shaft

Ascendshaft:
While exploring deep underground caves on an alien planet, worldwide seismic activity triggers a cave in which leaves only one narrow channel of ascent

A tale of action, horror, romance.... and betrayal

Endless Shaft:
Take control of the Perpetually Descending Man as he plummets ever downwards in five never ending shafts, each providing a unique challenge.

Avoid bats, rocks, missiles and more.

Compete to achieve the highest score on the online leaderboards (android version only).

Procedurally generated levels.

Special boulder throw and dive abilities add more nuance to the gameplay than you would expect.

Fearsome boss level to be unlocked.

name: Grand Academy for Future Villains
summary: Congratulations! We are delighted to welcome you to the Grand Academy for Future Villains, the world's finest evil preparatory school, where unimaginable power begins with a world-class education!

name: Tip of the Tongue
summary: Boost your English vocabulary with this engaging survival puzzler! Guess objects, learn, and progress through diverse categories.

name: Lab
summary: Explore and escape a mutant infested lab. Collect weapons, health and armor upgrades and fight and try to survive the onslaught!

name: Mexico 1921: A Deep Slumber
storyline:
Immerse yourself in post revolutionary Mexico City with: Mexico,1921: A Deep Slumber. An emotional and intriguing narrative adventure video game about the awakening of a country.

Mexico City, 1921. The country is wrapped in the recent consequences of years of conflict and revolution. Álvaro Obregón, leader of the revolution, is now at the head of a country with a brand new social constitution, and a population demanding education and human rights. With the help of intellectuals like José Vasconcelos and artists like Diego Rivera he intends to steer the country to a brighter future. Fast forward 7 years when President Obregón is shot and murdered under mysterious circumstances.
summary: Immerse yourself in an emotional and intriguing narrative adventure video game about the awakening of a country.

name: Digdig
storyline: The main character meets with trouble during his space trip, and when he crash-lands on a planet somewhere, the rocket he was riding on breaks down. The objective of the game is to earn coins by digging holes to fix the broken rocket, buy parts to repair the rocket, and escape from the planet.
summary: A casual game where you turn a crank and dig the ground more and more!

name: Palette Cleanser
summary: Palette Cleanser is a free, short, Action-Adventure experience, featuring exploration and a quick, paint-boosting moveset. Explore a once-colorful garden, restoring its stolen hues by stopping the color-hungry invaders!

name: Kingdoms Hegemony
summary: Reinterpreted a passionate and turbulent world of the Three Kingdoms!

name: Million Arthur: Arcana Blood
summary: A 2D fighting game for arcades by the developers of the Arcana Heart series based on the mobile card game Kaku-San-Sei Million Arthur.

name: Holiday Harry
summary: He’s evil on a shelf… Holiday horror creeps into your home, and he’s waiting right above your fireplace.

name: Morse vs. Horse
storyline: Travel back in time on a mission from the Morse Gods, to prove that Morse is, and always will be, the ultimate method of communication. Compete against inferior forms of communication: horse, car, train, and a guy running really fast.
summary: Deliver messages between ancient cities in morse code, in a battle against horses, cars, trains... and more! Start out by learning letters, then build up your skills until you can write full sentences, with numbers and punctuation. Officially self-approved best game in history.

name: Phantom Relics
summary: Phantom Relics is an isometric action slasher with roguelike elements. Explore ancient catacombs, battle hordes of darkness, and find powerful relics. Face the challenges solo or team up with a friend in local co-op to stop the awakening of evil.

name: Cloud Girl
summary: Cloud Girl is an addicting game in which you have to solve puzzles with Lovely Girls.The game is perfect for relaxing.

name: Labyrinth: The War on Terror
summary: Face the global war on terror in this engaging 2 player strategy game. Set against recent world events, Labyrinth portrays the U.S. efforts to counter extremists’ use of terrorist tactics, as well as the wider ideological struggle – guerrilla warfare, fundamentalist rule, regime change and more.

name: Sword of the Stars: The Pit Gold Edition - Necromancer
Countryside Legends
summary: Peaceful racing in a stylized countryside world awaits you, offering relaxing drives with six unique cars. Enjoy the serene atmosphere, explore scenic tracks, and compete against AI at your own pace.

name: Ninja Hayate HD Remaster
storyline: In feudal Japan, an evil clan of ninjas has spirited the princess away! Our hero, Hayate, must set out alone to infiltrate their trap-filled castle, and rescue her! All manner of evil ninjas, monsters and traps await him; can you guide him to his goal alive?!
summary:
Encounter relentlessly-attacking ninjas, their ninja dogs, zombie samurai and more, all whilst avoiding countless deadly traps in your mission to save the princess from the evil ninja clan who kidnapped her in this thrilling, interactive anime adventure!
First appearing in arcades in 1984, Ninja Hayate was Taito's 1st Laser Disc game, and this release features visuals remastered from the original laser disc.

name: Sky Falling Giant
storyline: Sky Falling Giant is an adventure Android game. Full of beautiful sight of clouds, Magical beanstalk and sky. In this fun game, sky Falling Giant is falling down of the Magical Tree's Bean Stalk. He faces dark clouds which are poisonous and make him die in no time. He collects Gold Coins and life on his escape Fall.
summary: Sky Falling Giant is an adventure Android game. Full of beautiful sight of clouds, Magical beanstalk and sky. In this fun game, sky Falling Giant is falling down of the Magical Tree's Bean Stalk. He faces dark clouds which are poisonous and make him die in no time. He collects Gold Coins and life on his escape Fall.

name: Tormentis
summary:
Prepare your dungeon against intruders and protect your loot chests with monsters and well-placed traps. Train your hero, equip powerful gear and conquer other players' dungeons to fight your way to the top of the league.

Where classic action role-playing meets dungeon building. Your task is to protect your loot boxes from intruders. They supply you with coins and your opponents want to empty them!

Create a unique dungeon that will mislead your opponents. Place monsters and traps in your dungeon and lead your opponents into an ambush. They may not reach your treasury in time!

With every victory over another player you will receive trophies and rise in the rankings.

name: Dragon Tycoon Edge
storyline: In a distant and hostile galaxy, a god decides to summon you in order to take over the galaxy.In the very beginning you have the morph of a pseudo-human but later, you will be able to transform into any creature you defeated.
summary: Dragon Tycoon Edge is a Role-Playing game, developed by Sala International, which was released in Japan in 1995.

name: Aden
summary: Dance! Dance! There's nothing to do but dance! A kawaii belt-scrolling dance battle for the new age! You save the world from destruction by controlling the mysterious girl and Akaka who appeared from the sky!

name: Colony
summary: A teenage guy is playing cricket with his friends outside a haunted house, and as he strikes a six,the ball travels inside the home.He goes to pick up the ball. During his search, he experienced a horrifying incident with the ghost.

name: Symbiotic Love
storyline:
There's nothing new under the sun. All stories go like this: Encounter. Curiosity. Attraction. Love

Two girls meet in a garden where the spider lilies bloom.
One girl seeks the devil's gentleness.
The other denies that the devil is capable of love at all.
Will the spider lilies grow in a symbiotic relationship, or will they become like the higanbana, and part ways for good?

Symbiotic Love is a coming-of-age Yuri Visual Novel set in an All Girls' High School, between two people fated to meet, become acquainted, friends, and eventually, lovers. Yet, what has fate in store for love so perfect, so symbiotic, that they could only live, and perish together?
summary: Symbiotic Love is a coming-of-age Yuri Visual Novel set in an All Girls' High School. What has fate in store for love so perfect, so symbiotic, that they could only live, and perish together?

name: Sniper Hunter Shooter
summary: For game lovers seeking realism, Sniper Hunter Shooter is an experience not to be missed! Fight as a sniper in a post-apocalyptic world, create your strategy, and test your shooting skills.

name: Apocalypse
summary: Apocalypse is a multi-user dungeon (MUD) built on a codebase called DIKU. The code has been modified over the course of about twenty-six years to come into its current state. Apocalypse draws heavily upon the world of Athas and the lore of Dark Sun.

name: Arcade Archives: Athena
summary: Athena is an action game released by SNK in 1986. Athena, the adventure-loving energetic princess of the Kingdom of Victory, goes on a journey to Fantasy World. Running, swimming, and even flying?! Utilize various weapons to defeat the looming enemies! Think you can defeat Dante, the evil emperor of Fantasy World?!

name: Suzumiya Haruhi no Tsuisou
storyline:
After Kyon activated the emergency escape protocol, the Disappearance version of Nagato waited for Kyon's answer. A large error in the time plane prompted Asahina to summon Kyon to repair it. Kyon ended up in The Disappearance alternate world. None of the SOS Brigade, not even Nagato, knew who he was. He made friends with Haruhi by getting her to perform in a band, helped Koizumi and Asahina win "beauty" contests, and helped Nagato's book sale.

Afterward, Kyon was able to return to the normal world, but decided to go back for a bit. He helped the alternate SOS Brigade make a movie. Then Kyon returned Nagato's Literature Club form with his name on it. The SOS Brigade (without him) would exist in the alternate world, preventing Nagato from being lonely.

Back in his original world at the nabe party, Kyon asked Nagato to go to the library during the weekend. She said she would think about it. However, the visit became a Brigade event instead. There Kyon told Nagato about her alternate self, referring to the alternate as another girl. Nagato said she was sure the other person was happy, because "she lives right there, in your memory".
summary: Suzumiya Haruhi no Tsuisou is a “wandering adventure” game for the PlayStation 3 and PlayStation Portable, published by Namco Bandai Games. It was released as a tie-in to The Disappearance of Haruhi Suzumiya film, taking place shortly afterward in the parallel universe.

name: The Hunt for the Lost Treasure
storyline:
Uncle Henry has been hunting lost treasures for as long as you can remember. His legendary stories of adventure excited your imagination as you were a child growing up. Now with your newly acquired archeology skills, he has been reaching out from time to time for your help in tracking down some of these difficult to find treasures.

In his latest quest, he has used the map you discovered in the lost ship and tracked down the location of the pirate’s cove. You must explore the island, find clues, and solve puzzles left behind by the pirates to discover the location of the lost treasure!
summary: Continue the adventure of the The Lost Ship in this longer quest as you hunt for the pirate's lost treasure in this beautifully designed classic point and click adventure puzzle game. Explore a pirate's cove, ancient temple, and structures of past tree dwelling inhabitants. Discover hidden passageways, clues and puzzles along the way!

name: Picture Builder
summary:
Picture Builder is a delight for enthusiasts of pixel art, color by number, puzzles, object finding, hidden objects, and other logical games and brain teasers. Within Picture Builder, you'll discover various cityscapes initially devoid of life. It's up to you to assemble all the elements of the picture, with each object or character representing a distinct puzzle piece. Since all puzzles are entirely unique, playing Picture Builder is always a joyful and intriguing game experience.

Each location unfolds before you in parts, requiring you to collect all objects to fill the city with interesting situations and characters. Your task is to find the correct fragments for each picture, enlarge objects, and utilize hints. In Picture Builder, you independently craft the city and its inhabitants, piece by piece. Puzzle-solving has never been this enjoyable. Install the puzzle game now and receive countless urban locations with an endless array of pixel puzzles.

name: Your Cattle
summary: An interactive casual game. By utilizing mechanics such as charging, knocking back, stunning, and blink, players can hone their skills in a low-pressure environment.Accompanied by exquisite music and smooth interactions, relieve emotional stress.

name: Sable's Grimoire: Man and Elf
summary: Elves' secrets run as deep as their grudges, and Sable is caught right in the middle of an old, escalating fued between a family of powerful elves.

name: The Lost Battalion
summary: The Lost Battalion is a large-scale overhaul mod for Arma 3, built around immersive, handcrafted missions and realistic military simulation. The mod combines custom-made assets, detailed operations, and a structured unit system to deliver an authentic tactical experience. Developed and maintained by its own dedicated community, The Lost Battalion runs continuous story-driven campaigns and handcrafted missions that emphasize teamwork, realism, and dynamic combat scenarios.

name: Big Adventure: Trip to Europe 3 - Collector's Edition
summary: Visit 9 European countries and search for interesting items in unforgettable old European towns and play a bunch of new mini games.

name: Kalevania
summary: Kalevania is a retro action platformer loosely based on Finnish mythology. Fight with bare hands, sword, axe, bow, and 11 runic weapons. With 50+ enemy types and collectibles, enjoy a full retro gaming experience! Play as Väinämöinen and relive classic console gaming!

name: Shin Megami Tensei
storyline: The game begins with the Hero dreaming that he meets the Law Hero, the Chaos Hero, and a woman named Yuriko; she promises that she will become the Hero's partner. He wakes up, and receives an e-mail with a computer program for summoning demons attached. While out on an errand, he learns that a scientist has opened a portal to the Expanse, which allows demons to enter Tokyo. He also meets Yuriko, who says she will fulfill her promise. The next night, the Hero again dreams that he meets the Law Hero and Chaos Hero, and that they save the Heroine from a sacrificial ritual. The next day, he meets the Law Hero and Chaos Hero in reality; they reveal that they had the same dreams. News of the demons spread, and the US military, led by ambassador Thorman, decides to intervene. The Japan Self-Defense Forces, led by general Gotou, opposes them, as they see demons as the ancient spirits of the land. A third group, led by the Heroine, tries to prevent conflict between the other two. She gets captured by Gotou's forces; they are about to publicly execute her under supervision by Yuriko, but she is saved by the Hero, Law Hero, and Chaos Hero. The Hero can choose to support Thorman or Gotou, or to reject both; regardless of his choice, the conflict escalates until Thorman launches missiles towards Tokyo. The Heroine is killed, but saves the Hero, Law Hero, and Chaos Hero by using magic to teleport them to another plane of existence.
summary:
Shin Megami Tensei is a remaster of the original Super Famicom game with improved graphics and gameplay along with a new difficulty mode.

The gameplay uses first-person navigation of dungeons and turn-based battles against demons. The player can recruit demons as allies by talking to them rather than fighting them, and two to three demons can be fused to create new demons.

name: Takkoman
storyline:
A world of bounty and order--Gensoukyou.
A world of ruin and chaos--Kouzatsukyou.

A great calamity evoked by an unknown being,
which spun these opposite worlds together.

Within this destroyed world, a single girl awakens,
Her name was Takorin.
summary: Takkoman -Kouzatsu World- is a stylish 2D action game born from character fan art based on the Touhou series, featuring individually unique creatures running rampant across all thirteen stages!

name: Parked in the Dark
summary: Find you car somewhere in the garage by finding clues, before the time runs out. But you are not as alone as you think...

name: DCS World: AV-8B Night Attack V/STOL
summary: The AV-8B project was born in the early 1970's as an effort to address the operational inadequacies of the AV-8A first generation Harrier, aimed to dramatically improve the capabilities and performance of the early AV-8A's.

name: QTI: Quantum Tunnel Idle
summary: An idle game based on the "tunneling effect"!

name: Moon Raider
storyline:
Ava is the young daughter of the brilliant-but-aging scientist Dr. Cavor and Selene, the former queen of the moon. As a selenite, Selene's life depends on the special energy only moon gems can provide. With none left and time running out, Dr. Cavor enlists his daughter to raid the moon of as many gems as she can find!

Ava must survive the treacherous catacombs deep beneath the surface of the moon. Her enemies, a legion of corrupt aliens that now rule the moon with force, are far less primitive than they first appear. Their world is full of terrifying technology, deadly traps, and armed soldiers at the ready. Ava soon realizes that the only way to save her mother is to save the moon from itself.
summary: Moon Raider is a 2D action adventure platformer set in the diverse and dangerous underworld of the moon.

name: Break My Case
summary:
"I'll take care of that problem for you."

A story about unraveling and cutting tangled threads.

Aporia, a store staffed by talented but somewhat out-of-the-ordinary employees, has two faces.
After operating as an ordinary cafe, only a limited number of customers are offered a relaxing time and special services.

Anything that can be done in place of a living person>

In a city where everything is saturated, responding to what is "not enough" - multi agency.

"You should work for me! As my representative, that is...as the owner's representative!"

A strange connection with such a store.
Surpass the situation on behalf of someone else.
An uncertain and sad day begins with them, where anything can take their place.

name: Ringlorn Saga
summary: Ringlorn Saga is an adventure RPG inspired by the Japanese PC classics. Prince Gerhard the Brave embarks on a journey to the neighboring land to investigate the appearance of a magic barrier and his father's disappearance.

name: Refactor
summary:
In 2015 I released an album, entitled Refactor. Several of the tracks started out as OSTs for aborted game projects, and most of the others were inspired by my love of video game music in general. I wanted to make some music videos for the songs to pay homage to the games that inspired them

In 2017 I quit my job to go indie, and figured that I should make a bunch of small, simple games while I figured out what I wanted to be doing long-term.

These separate ideas were refactored into a single one.

name: Vega Chronicle
summary: A turn-based 4X space strategy game with streamlined logistics. Explore the galaxy and build colonies. Accumulate resources, discover tech, and build a navy to conquer your rivals. Earn bonuses to empower your next play-through with ancestral virtues, and build your legacy among the stars.

name: Twilight Wars
summary: Twilight Wars is a dungeon crawler set in a cyberpunk world where secret agents battle for corporate interests. Bring back a secret organization, recruit and equip a team of specialists - and eliminate those who stand in your way!

name: Pari Delicto
summary: In a post cyberpunk dystopia you find a world attempting to recover from authoritarianism, you find yourself, a budding paralegal, trying to climb your way up the justice system. You are mentoring under your close friend, and attorney, Iris.

name: My Club Dino
summary: My Club Dino is an online fun and educational dinosaur game, targeted for young kids in between 5 and 12 years old. My Club Dino combines fun, education and interaction

name: Diamond Hollow
summary: Shoot, upgrade, conquer enemies, attempt achievements, collect gems, all in an attempt to escape an endless cave

name: Christmas Soul
summary: Santa and his helpers have been kidnapped! Mysterious aliens are plotting to destroy the holidays. Fortunately, all is not lost. Take on the role of a brave Snowman – the last defender of Christmas in a dynamic 2D platformer with arcade combat. Bring back the magic of Christmas!

name: Q.U.B.E. 2
summary: Q.U.B.E. 2 is the sequel to the hit first-person puzzle game Q.U.B.E. You are Amelia Cross, a stranded archaeologist who has awoken among the ruins of an ancient alien landscape. With the distant help of another survivor you must manipulate the structure of this mysterious world and find a way back home.

name: Marippy
summary: Marippy is a Touhou fan game based on the arcade game Mappy. The game has the player play as Marisa Kirisame as she collects items from Alice Margatroid's house which Alice had stole.

name: My Best Friends: Cats & Dogs
summary:
Can this be real? Sure, because this is a pet care game where puppies and kittens can be taken care of and be given a lot of training as well. You are responsible for the sensitive upbringing of your pet: You decide on the food, the composition of training courses, the grooming and decorating.

If the pet is given optimal food, grooming and heaps of love it will perform well in both agility and beauty competitions. Winning these, the owner will be able to buy even better pet care products and costumes for the loved one. Detailed and realistic animations of the cute Huskies, Dalmatians, Retrievers, German Shepherds, Maine Coons, British Blue, Siamese and European house cats provide extra fun and motivation.

name: Way of the Hunter: Hunter's Advantage Pack
summary: Enhance your hunting experience with the Hunter’s Advantage Pack, featuring three specialized rifles and a versatile electronic caller. Designed for all types of wildlife, this DLC delivers precision, power, and adaptability in every shot.

name: Divergence: Online
summary: Divergence: Online is an open-world sandbox MMO that began as the spiritual successor to Pre-NGE SWG, but since has grown into its own living breathing universe. Divergence was designed to provide unmatched crafting, player and guild housing and player freedom on a scale, we believe, never before achieved. We hope you'll enjoy our Early Access release and help us continue to develop this game!

name: Eclipse Survivors
summary: Experience the ultimate challenge in Eclipse Survivors, a bullet-hell / area shooter game featuring epic bosses inspired by classic 16-bit titles. Collect XP gems, master unique skills, and dodge countless enemy bullets as you face off against hordes of foes. Will you survive the eclipse?

name: Gesshizu: Gajigaji Nakama wo Sodateyou
summary:
A game where you raise creatures hatched from eggs that can change based on how they are raised. What they eat and where they are can affect this.
You take pictures of them in various situations to complete challenges and earn rewards while filling out an encyclopedia of all the different variations available.

name: No Legs? No Problem!
summary: Be the first to reach the goal in this intense 4 player racing game. Challenge your friends to a free for all or team up in an epic 2v2 race battle. Use your abilities to grief your enemies, or boost yourself to the finish line.

name: Sticker/Ball
storyline:
In STICKER/BALL you fire balls. Hit dice with the balls to earn points, and ricochet back for even more. You’ll also unlock stickers, which come in many forms: spiders, poop, clown. Stickers can interact in strange ways. For example, poop attracts flies. Spiders make webs. Spider webs catch flies. More points for you!

Battle a gauntlet of weird opponents, unlock cool new stickers, and stack crazy combos for lots and lots of points. Once you run out of balls it’s game over :( But you can take what you learned and try again! :)
summary: STICKER/BALL is a pool game roguelike from the future. Fire balls. Hit dice. Earn points. Add stickers. Trigger crazy combos. Enjoy the chaos, it’s on purpose.

name: Sea of Radiation
summary: In this crisis-ridden, nuclear-polluted sea, all creatures are slowly mutating. You will play as an ordinary fish, in the nuclear contaminated sea accumulated radiation mutation, attack and devour is the only way you grow, defeat other monsters, and ultimately become the only overlord of this ocean.

name: Rock 'N Racing Bundle Off Road & Rally
storyline:
Off Road offers the most entertaining and exciting races, with loads of skids, crashes and amazing jumps. You will have several modes of play, such as Cup mode, time trial and multi-player with the option of up to 4 Players at a time.

In Rally Rock 'N Racing, you’ll enjoy a wide variety of natural environments, such as deserts, snow-covered mountains, forests... where you can show your skill at the wheel, competing against everyone to become the fastest. The game has several modes, such as Championship, Time Trial, Arcade, and 4-player multiplayer.
summary: Enjoy 2 games in 1 with this irresistible speed games pack!

name: Call of Duty: Black Ops II - Nuketown 2025 Edition
storyline: The non-linear storyline will see you battling during a futuristic Cold War, as well as tackling flashbacks from historical missions and playing as various members of the Mason family. Every decision you make during this story will affect future consequences, giving you a different experience every time you play.
summary:
Pushing the boundaries of what fans have come to expect from the record-setting entertainment franchise, Call of Duty: Black Ops II propels players into a near future, 21st Century Cold War, where technology and weapons have converged to create a new generation of warfare.

Call of Duty: Black Ops II - Nuketown 2025 Edition includes:
- a copy of the base game
- the multiplayer map Nuketown 2025

name: Survalker
summary: Hordes of unknown creatures emerge from the darkness, hunting for your soul. Gather artifacts, enhance your abilities, and search for a way out of this cursed place… if an escape even exists.

name: Heroes & Redemption
summary: Heroes & Redemption is a rogue-lite bullet-hell where you face hordes of enemies, annihilate them, learn new abilities and enhance your skills. Explore different regions, acquire new companions and embark on adventures again and again.

name: Sad Virus Forest
summary: New part sad virus walking game series. Now collect beer bottles at forest and avoid traps.

name: Project Tristars
storyline: This game's scenarios continues from the live dramas in 3 Majesty×X.I.P. LIVE -SPLASH SUMMER FES 2017-. Its presentation is meant to be a live documentary, as each member recalls their group origins to a faceless and mute camera man working with the director. Unlike previous instances, Project TRISTARS provides in-depth personal insights and illustrated content for about five months of the groups' formations.
summary:
The previous activities for the 5th anniversary of the debut of the idol group "3 Majesty" "XIP" is recorded. You can enjoy their documentary from a new aspect, by choosing valuable scenes of the idols
Video of the performance of "3 Majesty × XIP LIVE - SPLASH SUMMER FES 2017" held at DMM VR THEATER in August 2017 and footage of the popular "Victory Live" at the app version "Tokimeki Restaurant" Total 15 or more recorded
All the visuals displayed in important scenes of documentaries are photographed by Makoto Maekazaki. You can see not only the idols that you always expected but also the new aspect of them such as how to strive behind the scenes

name: Knight Speed
summary: Embark on an epic medieval adventure in this fast-paced endless runner. As a valiant knight, leap across perilous towers, skillfully shoot down enemies with your trusty bow, and protect your kingdom while racing against the relentless passage of time.

name: First Moon of Mercury
summary: Solve and construct sci-fi puzzle boxes into the First Moon of Mercury, a space station designed to study and deflect dangerous solar flares. Will you trust the right crew members to ensure the safety of humanity or will the saboteurs succeed?

name: Danmaku Unlimited 4 Wyver Ultra
summary: Arise Wyver and fly against overwhelming odds in this modern labor of love tribute to classic shoot'em ups!

name: Hifuu Fragment
summary: 東方Projectでおなじみ、上海アリス幻樂団様制作の音楽CDシリーズ「秘封倶楽部」の二次創作ノベルゲームです。選択肢はありません。物語中で入手した記憶の欠片「フラグメント」や、プレイヤー自身の知恵によって物語を分岐させ、彼女達の冒険―蓮台野夜行―を成功に導きましょう。

name: SandTest
summary: A Flash falling sand game by onimatrix, hosted on Kongregate.

name: Deflector
summary:
A puzzle game where your objective is to control a laser beam towards its destination. You goal is to redirect the laser beam from its source to the destination using objects like mirrors and prisms. But beware! There are valuable objects in the way that you must work around in order to win.

There are 90 unique levels with 3 different difficulty modes to test your puzzle skills to deflect the laser to its destination

name: Punzel: Chapter I - Toujours la Meme Histoire
summary: Imagine you are a captured princess...but the hero never arrives. Join Punzel in her adventure of trying to escape her tower prison. Experience the boredom of captivity, the daily frustrations of haggling with your captors and crows. Lots of crows.

name: PsyOps Solutions
summary: This JRPG was made for true JRPG fans. As an employee of PsyOps Solutions, you will need to complete the Contract given to you: Kill General Swanson. You are going to need to explore, fight, and help people out to become strong enough to complete your mission.

name: Pinball Arcade: Bram Stoker's Dracula
storyline: Bram Stokers Dracula (1993) is based on the hit movie of the same name. Designed by Barry Oursler and Mark Sprenger, this fast playing table features a stunning playfield with an eerie graveyard, Dracula's Manor, Transylvania Castle and Dracula himself in his coffin! Three amazing Multi-Ball modes can be active simultaneously for Multi Multi-Ball, which increases the values of Jackpots and other shots in the game. The unique, Mist Multi-Ball feature begins by the floating of the mystical, magnetized ball from Dracula's Castle through the green mist across the playfield to the Abbey. Knocking this ball off its path activates this one-of-a-kind mode. This is a game you can really sink your teeth into! 6,801 units of this table were produced.

name: The Garden Pub
summary: You have just acquired an old pub in a small gnomish village, and now all you have to do is get it cleaned up and ready to serve the whole village! You barely have enough room to serve a handful of customers, so you must build up your reputation and gold in order to stock your pub and expand your dining area.

name: Li Li Nuo De Qi Huan Zhi Lu
summary: Lina was judged a witch by the church, and Lilina was ordered to execute her best friend... After a few years, theia territory again appeared the trace of the devil, Lilina decided to seek the truth in those days, set foot on the journey.

name: Dog Game!
summary:
Dog Game is simple yet highly-addictive! To play, all you need to do is collect different kinds of cute & unique dogs and build a home for them, your very own Dog Tower! You can craft decoration and create lovely rooms to unlock cute new puppies to fill them with every single day.

Collect adorable dogs like shiba inu, husky, pug, bulldog, golden retriever and beagle! There’s over 900 puppys you can collect! Decorate rooms in your dog towers with your favourite styles: unicorn, fancy, legendary, anime, magic and so many more!

name: Tiger Tank 59 I: Mission Pack 063
summary: The classic tank battle game re-opens, guarding your base and defeating all enemy tanks.

name: WhoIs
summary: A 4-8 player PvP game of deception and paranoia. You have a role, a target, and one mission: eliminate them and escape. Use powerful abilities at the risk of revealing your identity. In this ever-changing arena, hunt or be hunted.

name: Toys vs. Nightmares
summary:
The nightmares have been unleashed from your closet and all you have are some books and toy soldiers….

Strategize and defend yourself from the evil monsters lurking in your closet. Use robots, rubber frogs, and miners to stop the ghosts and make it through the night.

name: Pokémon Lime Version
summary: Welcome to the Celto Region, the setting of Pokémon Lime Version, which is inspired by Ireland! The goal of our rom hack is to capture and emulate a familiar, yet new Gen 3 experience. You will journey throughout Celto, completing the gym challenge, meeting various characters, and venturing through all four seasons along the way. Some will aid you on your journey, while others may stand in your way to the top!

name: Hispalis: Proyecto NoDo
summary:
Discover the free video game created by two Pokémon -loving fans from Seville that's taking Andalusia by storm.

Immerse yourself in the history of Hispalis , a post-apocalyptic Seville devastated by a massive pandemic, where Pokémon now reign supreme.

name: Generator Rex: Agent of Providence
summary:
Rex must prevent Van Kleiss and his minions from gaining unprecedented powers that could destroy the Earth. Multi-Head, Biowulf and the Heart of Aquania appear in the game, as supporting villains.

When Rex goes on a mission to defeat the EVO, Multi-Headed EVO, he discovers a piece of a blueprint which later is stolen by Breach. This causes Rex to lose some of his new builds. He reports this happening to Providence and goes to the Jungle. A piece of the blueprint is located in Dr. Rylander's lab, where Rex copies Rylander's data. He is then quickly attacked by the "Rabbit EVO", who he later defeats. Breach steals the blueprint again, as Rex returns to Providence. Afterwards, Rex goes to Hong Kong with Bobo Haha to stop Quarry (Rex's original boss) from stealing items, including a piece of the blueprint. To Rex's interest he encounters his romantic love, Circe. He finds out that she is working for Van Kleiss, again, as he helped her escape from him.

name: Eclipse of the Moon
summary: Eclipse of the Moon has the story of entering a magic school and breaking the coming crisis of reflux. Wear VR to become a student of the academy and prepare for the upcoming threat. The level of difficulty of this game will vary depending on the player's ability

name: Rockman IQ Xuànfēng
summary:
Rockman IQ Xuànfēng (洛克人IQ旋風 "Rockman IQ Whirlwind") is a licensed Mega Man video game released for home computer only in Taiwan by Strawberry Software.
Rockman IQ Xuànfēng is a collection of five games. Players can register their names and save high scores, with a leaderboard showing the highest score from each player in each games.

name: Lifetakers & Heartbreakers
summary: "Lifetakers & Heartbreakers" is an intense 2D side-scrolling shooter set in the war-torn world of Pavlovia.

name: The Divine Speaker: The Sun and the Moon
storyline:
Journey to the past with The Divine Speaker: The Sun and the Moon, an enthralling fantasy visual novel and 18+ prequel to the popular BL game, The Divine Speaker.​​

Follow the intertwining journeys of Lucius and Aemyl as they navigate their past and future, each grappling with the fate they have been dealt. Will they be able to find a happy future, or does only pain and suffering await them?

Lucius longs for a past that he cannot return to, while Aemyl is fixated on creating a future that may not come to pass. As their paths cross and their stories become intertwined, each must come to terms with the destiny that awaits them... or refuse to accept it.

In a game of the past and the future, the sun and the moon, who will come out on top?
summary: The story-rich 18+ prequel to The Divine Speaker. Follow alongside a younger Aemyl as he uncovers the world for himself!

name: Biblically Inaccurate
summary: A fast-paced subversive endless runner, where you play as the runner's guardian angel. Protect them with your mouse by clicking and dragging obstacles out of the way as they running through ancient rome.

name: Şükür
storyline: Furkan is not satisfied with what he has and wants more money, so he decides to go into the treasure business. In this way, he meets the teacher who will help him. Hodja says he will help him if they share the treasure they are going to find. They take out the treasure, but Furkan kills the teacher there. This is why the Zuzula Tribe will haunt Furkan.
summary: Şükür, It is a horror-thriller game with a first-person story. From the moment you enter the game, you will feel that you are alone in the forest and you will try every way to escape.

name: Approaching Infinity: Shipyards
summary: Design your own custom starting ship with a point-based system and access to every weapon and device in the game. Tow 5-deck shipwrecks to get more points. Space stations will offer more ships for sale, and the asteroid base will have a brand new ship upgrade service: the Shipwright!

name: Human Souvenir
storyline: You just returned from a vacation in planet Earth. You wanted to stay longer, but you did not have any more vacation days left... Instead, you bought a Human Souvenir to relive your memories of interacting with Earth Humans. And, of course, to impress your colleagues that you own a Human now.
summary: You just visited the earth and got a famous 'Human Souvenir'. Would you be able to keep your human alive enough time to see them through their whole life cycle?

name: Steel Rain Complete
summary:
Prepare for the ultimate shoot-'em-up / strategy ReMix with RPG elements!

Steel Rain is a truly novel mix of strategy, RPG, and frantic action, with a modern, high velocity shmup core at its center. You get to control 2 wings you can tactically arrange in different formations and firemodes, as you fight your way through an impressive variety of overwhelmingly huge enemy fleets.

Liberate planets, build colonies, research new technologies, and learn new active and passive skills. Construct buildings, and research new combat technologies and skills. Wisely craft items, and play through missions to gather the experience points and cash needed for even more exotic and powerful upgrades.

Never forget to install your shiny new upgrades, construct cunning drone pets, and buy new wings; make your strikes deadlier than ever!

Instantly switch through 3 different wing formations, and combine them with 6 fully customizable firemodes, in order to develop your very own sets of special tactics and strategies for each and every situation; on the spot!

Complete missions and survive epic bossfights on 7 different planets, play randomly generated orbital patrol missions, or design and create your very own stages with the built-in stage editor, as you fight to become a true master of Steel Rain.

Fight for leaderboard positions, get classic rankings, and unlock over 80 achievements in this unique, fun, and taxing new indie game!

Steel Rain is not only frantic. It is a deep and strategic experience too. The game offers impressive gameplay variety, 10 difficulty levels, and a hardcore mode, to let you freely modify your gaming experience. Full and complete gamepad and joystick support are, of course, a given.

name: Wipeout XL
storyline:
Whereas the original game introduced the F3600 anti-gravity racing league in the year 2052, Wipeout 2097 is set over four decades later and introduces the player to the much faster, more competitive, and more dangerous F5000 AG racing league. The game is set exactly 101 years after the actual release year of the game (100 in the Saturn port's case).
